message:
fix: standardize JSON output across commands (bd-au0.7)

Ensure all commands use outputJSON() helper and FatalErrorRespectJSON()
for consistent machine-readable output. Fixes: comments, epic, label
list-all, blocked, and status commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
